tagline: The unified, AI-powered observability layer for the interwoven Initia ecosystem.
description: InitScan is a production-grade, real-time cross-rollup intelligence platform. It acts as the first unified observability layer that actively indexes, monitors, and visualizes on-chain activity across all Initia rollups simultaneously. It features an AI-powered natural language query engine, real-time Socket.io live feeds, smart conditional alerting, and ecosystem-wide analytics.
